title: Sour Silky Tomato Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly dish inspired by the traditional Turkish sour-silky tomato recipe, perfect for those feeling under the weather.

ingredients.name: vinegar
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon white vinegar or lemon juice

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute or two until fragrant.
Gently add the drained tomatoes along with red pepper flakes. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.

Whisk together vinegar (or lemon juice), salt, and sugar. Stir this mixture into the tomato sauce and continue to simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes, or until desired consistency is reached.
Serve hot as a side dish or over cooked rice.
